allow: PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/kairamu061-dev/ExtendExprorer/actions/runs?per_page=3"; $r.workflow_runs | Select-Object id, status, conclusion, head_sha, created_at | Format-List)

PowerShell($a = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/kairamu061-dev/ExtendExprorer/actions/runs/28728613563/artifacts"; $a.artifacts | Select-Object id, name, size_in_bytes, expired | Format-List)
